questions: what is a large language model?
tell me about large language models
large language model er limitation ki?
answers: LLM or Large Language Model holo ekta AI model ja billions of parameters niye train kora hoy massive text data er upore. GPT-4, Claude, Gemini — shob LLM examples.
A Large Language Model is an AI system trained on vast amounts of text data to understand and generate human-like text. They can write, translate, summarize, code, and answer questions.
LLMs work by predicting the next token in a sequence. They're trained on huge datasets using transformer architecture. While powerful, they can hallucinate and don't truly understand meaning.

Large Language Models like GPT, Claude, and LLaMA have revolutionized NLP. They use self-attention mechanisms to process text and can perform diverse tasks with remarkable fluency, though they need careful prompting.
